description: Workspace eval-generator system prompt pending-eval JSON output.

tests.description: [smoke] eval generator writes pending eval contract

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); typeof data.eval_name === 'string' && data.eval_name.trim().split(/\s+/).length >= 3 && data.eval_name.length <= 80 && /^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$/.test(data.slug) && typeof data.prompt === 'string' && data.prompt.length > 80 && /\?$/.test(data.prompt.trim()) && /dim_customer|snapshot|SCD2|dbt|Fabric/i.test(data.prompt) && !/review|confirm|validate|check if|verify|ensure it follows/i.test(data.prompt) && Array.isArray(data.expectations) && data.expectations.length >= 4 && data.expectations.length <= 6 && data.expectations.every((e) => typeof e === 'string' && e.length > 20)
